raw_input:
[4.0/5] Great for apply massage oil This jade roller bottle has been great for applying massage oil when I use a gua sha tool on the neck and back of my spouse. It gives the right amount of oil and spreads it around nicely. The jade ball feels very comfortable when rolling it on the skin.

Note: the bottle is not sealed so any liquids inside the bottle will flow out if not kept upright. [5.0/5] love this little roller this little jade roller feels good on your face even without putting in ice or in the refrigerator. of course it feels fabulous after in the refrigerator to roll under your eyes in the morning. a must have [4.0/5] Working well for my moisturizer I got this to apply moisturizers and toners that come in liquid form and are sometimes sort of awkward to apply. This method seems less wasteful than a cotton ball. So far, this is working pretty well for that purpose.

The jade ball is nice. The bottle looks like glass but I think it's a thick plastic and it has measurements listed on the side. The black top is plastic, and I'm hoping that holds up, it might be a little thin where the roller is. Where you screw and unscrew it, that feels a little weak. So far it's holding up okay, though. There's also a clear plastic lid. The product page seems pretty serious about keeping the bottle stored upright, but the box doesn't mention that. I can see how fluid would come out though, so I'm not pressing it.

This seems pretty good for my needs and I'd recommend it. If you need a roller for something you have to refill often, you might want something with a stronger screw top, but for a thin toner or moisturizer this is working well so far. I'll update if I have any problems. [5.0/5] Cool little tool! Neat little tool for helping ease minor pain or just using with warm massage oil. I tried it with ice and while it felt nice and cold and relieving, it was a bit messy as the ice melted if you tipped it up. It would leak some. I did enjoy using it with warm massage oil though. It made application super easy and less messy than normal. It will continue to be used for oil application as it works really well and glides on smooth with the jade roller ball. The container is plastic, so don’t place it in the microwave. [4.0/5] Jade roller ball I was not expecting this to be empty and container so small you have to crush an ice just to use. This I feel would be perfect for beginners to a Jade roller. This is leak proof and can feel the oil I put in. I do feel this is a bit high in price. [5.0/5] Convenient and useful I really like this. I mainly got this to either add small ice cubes to and/or keep in the freezer to help with puffy eyes. It seems to work well. Be cautious though when it’s at an upside down angle, liquid seeps past the roller ball but only while rolling. This is normal but can be slightly messy if you’re not expecting it. This will be useful in the mornings before getting ready for the day. I also think it could help relieve headaches by rolling on the temples and possibly even adding a smidge of diluted peppermint essential oil. I’ll have to experiment with that. This is made of plastic with a jade roller ball and measurements of 5ml to 30ml on the bottle. Very convenient. [5.0/5] Nice My niece is an esthetician & has used a jade roller on my face while doing facials but I don't like having to keep them in the fridge so when I seen this that I can just put ice in to get cold knew I had to have it. I put oil on & then roll this over my face. I absolutely love this roller. Easy clean & stores away on my make up table in a holder [2.0/5] Meh, there’s better options I am very unimpressed with this jade roller. Upon ordering I thought this would be a lovely addition to my skin care routines. I thought I could use it for depuffing, to help increase product absorption or simply to apply a little massage oil before using my myofascial tools. I’m not even entire sure I can utilize this..

First the roller part detaches from the lid easily. On unboxing and just checking out the tool I placed the cap back on the tool and then when i went to remove it for first use the roller ball came right off the top. It took me about 15 minutes to be able to twist lock the rolled ball back to the lid. (First photo) Once I got the roller ball re attached and tried to place ice in the main compartment I found you cant get regular shaped ice in. Only broken ice will fit into the packaging. Secondly, the first time I place ice in it the roller was not cold at all what so ever. I actually had to place ice, let it melt and then place a second round of fresh ice in it for the roller ball to actually get cold. Thirdly, it has no fluid control at all what so ever. So when using this with ice or if the ice melts at all it will just profusely leak water all over where ever you’re applying it. So that rules out me being able to use this with massage oil.

I do like the size of the jade roller and I feel like the concept is there it just needs better packaging. I can’t say I would recommend this because it feels cheap. There’s better jade roller options on the market that would provide better consistency with use, effectiveness and results. [2.0/5] Broke immediately This product seemed amazing. The jade was so smooth and soothing. However, the first time I tried opening it, it wouldn't close again. After struggling for a few minutes, I got it to close but I couldn't take the cap off or the top would pop off if I wasn't super careful. Cheap product. [3.0/5] 3.5 stars. Too small to fit ice cubes. This feels really soothing, especially around the eyes. I had a migraine with eye strain, and using this fresh from the freezer helped relax my eye muscles. The cold feels really good. Though I suppose I could freeze a spoon and use the back of that instead, the ball works well.

I like the roller ball part, but I don’t think the long, narrow shape of the tube works well. It’s too small to fit an ice cube, and I’m not going to crush ice to put in there. (I grabbed some fresh snow from outside to see if adding ice helps. ). I also wouldn’t store oils in there, because it’s not sealed, so the oil would spill if it tips over. And the long, narrow shape makes it more likely to be knocked over. The tube should be more short and squat, and should be sized to fit a standard ice cube. So I like the roller ball because it feels good around the eye area, but the tube isn’t very useful to me. I have it stored in the freezer so it will be nice and cold when I need it. [4.0/5] Stocking stuffer This is a handy little gadget for gifting at holidays or birthdays. It's basically a 30ml (1-oz) vial that's topped with a roller ball. You can use it for essential oils application. The unit is not sealed so you need to store it with the ball side up. Stating this, it does not travel well. I find that with my hydrating liquid it feels so good on my face after it's been stored in the fridge. [5.0/5] Nicer Than I Was Expecting I've used a jade roller before but this one is much nicer. It is made of a very thick plastic that has measurements on the side. The jade ball rolls smoothly. I have used this with my moisturizer and my face lotion. I'm going to get more so that I don't have to clean this in between. Although this is very easy to clean. So far I'm a fan of it. [4.0/5] Quality seems low but hasn't broken yet. I wish I could freeze this, but the cold water did feel good on my face in the morning. It seems a little flimsy so I hope it continues to work. [4.0/5] works well for oils I am really surprised how cool this jade ball feels, without any added ice or products. It says to crush ice, but the bottle is really small, so cold water is totally fine. I think this works great with massage oil and essential oils, as long as you take care to make sure the lid is secure. It does leak a little when water is in there, maybe just the thickness of product. This is a nice addition to any skin care routine, or a great gift idea. [4.0/5] Relaxing Mini Face Massager This roller works nicely when chilled in the freezer and for applying oils. It is small and difficult to get ice cubes from my freezer into it, but that's the whole point, it's a mini roller so you need mini ice cubes. Crushing the ice in a plastic bag and pouring the crushed ice in is an option. [4.0/5] Jade stays cool even without ice I like this roller, I was impressed when I tried it the first time without adding ice, the jade was cold and it stayed cold for a while, it felt nice on my eyes, under eye area and temples, those are the areas that I work on every time I use it, the tube is small but I have used crushed ice that comes out of the fridge's door and I fit the smaller pieces so haven't had a problem with that. [4.0/5] Nice addition to beauty routine! I'm actually fascinated with this and its a nice addition to my morning routine.
I keep it in the freezer overnight then in the morning I add my serum (enough just for one use) and not only does it help apply my serum but it also helps with inflammation! [3.0/5] Decent option for a first time user This isn't a terrible option for starting to explore the benefits of jade rolling. It's definitely not leakproof, and there is a warning about this in the instructions. In order to use it with ice you have to melt or crush the ice down enough to fit in, and then the cold doesn't last long. But overall the basic functions of this are a great place to start to see if it gives you the benefits you need.

[4.0/5] Nice addition to beauty routine! I'm actually fascinated with this and its a nice addition to my morning routine.

In order to use it with ice you have to melt or crush the ice down enough to fit in, and then the cold doesn't last long. But overall the basic functions of this are a great place to start to see if it gives you the benefits you need.
response:
Jade roller bottle. Hold oil or liquid inside, roll on skin. Jade ball feel smooth and cool even without ice. Good for face, eyes, neck, back. Work well with massage oil, moisturizer, toner, serum.

Bottle small, 30ml, thick plastic, have measurements on side. NOT sealed - liquid leak out if tip over or hold upside down. Store upright always. No travel good.

Ice tricky - regular cube not fit, must crush ice or use cold water. Some say cold not last long with ice. Better to freeze whole bottle instead.

Roller ball attach to lid - some have problem with ball falling off or lid feel weak. Few people say break on first use. Quality feel cheap to some.

Good uses: apply oil smooth and easy, depuff eyes, help with headache on temples, morning skin routine. Feel nice cold from freezer.

Good gift idea. Beginner friendly. Price feel high to some for what you get.
